summary: Comprehensive backend + frontend testing of BuildPilot Phases 1-7 expansion. 25/25 backend pytest cases pass (regression + new endpoints). Frontend E2E exercised login, dashboard analytics, stage selector, checklist persistence, all 6 AI mode panels, extended score, export dropdown variants, regenerate, edit, settings, and protected-route guard - all working.
critical_code_review_comments: ProjectDetail.jsx is ~1090 lines - consider splitting AI panels, export builders, and score components into separate files for maintainability (>700 line guideline).

Export builders (buildMarkdown / buildFounderBrief / buildTechPlan / buildLaunchChecklist / buildPitchSummary) are pure functions and could move to /app/frontend/src/lib/exporters.js to slim down ProjectDetail.jsx.

CORS uses allow_credentials=False with allow_origins='*' from env - fine for current Bearer-token auth (localStorage), but if cookie auth is ever turned on, explicit origins + credentials=True will be required.
AI endpoints accept arbitrary Dict body without Pydantic model - acceptable since only project_id is used, but a typed AIModeIn(BaseModel) would improve validation/docs.
seed_data_creation: Test users TEST_*@buildpilot.app created via /api/auth/register during pytest session; one project created+deleted via UI flow.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Phase 1-7 features verified end-to-end. Backend test file at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py covers 25 cases including parametrized AI modes, stage updates, checklist persistence, dashboard analytics, and user isolation. Frontend test confirmed: dashboard-analytics, stat-* cards, stage-count-* chips (all 7 stages), stage-selector persists on reload, checklist-progress + 10 checklist-item-* toggles persist, all 6 ai-mode-*-panel render, extended-score-card with 3 extended-score-* tiles, idea-score-card + difficulty-badge still present, export-dropdown with all 5 export-* variants, detail-regenerate (POST /api/projects/{id}/generate -> 200), detail-edit-toggle + edit-save-button, /settings shows admin email, removing bp_token from localStorage triggers redirect to /login. Note: the create-project form lives at /projects/new and there can be a brief moment where URL is still /projects/new during async create+navigate - any future test should poll for pid != 'new' before deriving the project id.
rca of the issue: No bugs found - feature set is shipping-ready.
